Hobbies

My lifelong hobby is photography. I love hanging around and taking photos with my smartphone (Redmi Note 10 pro) in my leisure time My favourite genre are astrophotography, macro photography, and street life. You can check my Instagram for my lastest creations.

I also love reading books, especially Sci-fi/Fantasy such as Dune, The Three-body Problem, A Song of Ice and Fire, The Lord of the Rings. I quite enjoy watching their movie/tv-series adaptations when I’m free. I read The Godfather every year.

These are some of my favorite photos:

“Only those who seek shall find!”
